channel.title: Projects on Pistaha Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Pistaha Portfolio

item.title: Campus Wayfinding System
item.author: hello@example.com (Pistaha)
item.description: A modular signage and mapping system that helps first-year students navigate campus confidently.

item.title: Recipe App for Shared Kitchens
item.author: hello@example.com (Pistaha)
item.description: A mobile experience that simplifies meal planning and reduces food waste in shared housing.

item.title: Personal Portfolio Redesign
item.author: hello@example.com (Pistaha)
item.description: A refreshed identity and site structure focused on clarity, rhythm, and fast performance.

item.title: Community Lab Visual Toolkit
item.author: hello@example.com (Pistaha)
item.description: A visual system for workshop flyers, social posts, and event signage.
